description: Open toed, brown sandalsSynthetic upper with criss-cross straps at the forefoot and ankle loop with cushioned back, Velcro closures and branding on the straps, has a vertical strap connecting the forefoot strap and ankle loopCushioned footbed with branding and stitched detail at the edgesTough, rubber outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months
